revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月廿四]][[zh:正月廿四]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 24|qq=January 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 24''' is the 24th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * First year of the {{ill|Shenlong era|de|Shenlong-Zeit|ja|神龍 (唐)|zh|神龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shenlong era|1=Shenlong era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11591054}} (Julian calendar {{ill|22 February 705|de|22. Februar 705|ja|705年2月22日|zh|705年2月22日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/22 February 705|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) — {{ill|Zhang Jianzhi|en|Zhang Jianzhi|qid=Q135510355|lt=Zhang Jianzhi|1=Zhang Jianzhi}} compels {{ill|Wu Zetian|en|Wu Zetian|qid=Q9738|lt=Wu Zetian|1=Wu Zetian}} to abdicate in favour of the Crown Prince. The Crown Prince ascends the throne as {{ill|Emperor Zhongzong of Tang|en|Emperor Zhongzong of Tang|qid=Q9717|lt=Emperor Zhongzong of Tang|1=Emperor Zhongzong of Tang}}, and the dynastic name changes back from Zhou to the {{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|qid=Q9683|lt=Tang dynasty|1=Tang dynasty}}. * 2nd year of the {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji era|1=Genji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|19 February 1865|de|19. Februar 1865|ja|1865年2月19日|zh|1865年2月19日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/19 February 1865|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) — The {{ill|Oura Church|en|Oura Church|qid=Q430626|lt=Basilica of the Twenty-Six Martyrs of Japan|1=Oura Church}} in Nagasaki is completed. * 4th year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|14 March 1871|de|14. März 1871|ja|1871年3月14日|zh|1871年3月14日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/14 March 1871|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) — {{ill|Post office|de|Postamt|ja|郵便役所|zh|邮政局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Post office|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (predecessors of the modern {{ill|Post office|en|Post office|qid=Q35054|lt=Japan Post Office|1=Post office}}) are opened in Tokyo, Kyoto and Osaka; operations begin on 1 March.
== Births == * 4th year of the {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku era|1=Eiroku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|8 February 1561|de|8. Februar 1561|ja|1561年2月8日|zh|1561年2月8日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/8 February 1561|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) — {{ill|Fujiwara Seika|en|Fujiwara Seika|qid=Q655390|lt=Fujiwara Seika|1=Fujiwara Seika}}, {{ill|Neo-Confucianism|en|Neo-Confucianism|qid=Q825754|lt=Neo-Confucianism|1=Neo-Confucianism}} scholar (+1619). * 2nd year of the Genji era (Gregorian calendar 19 February 1865) — {{ill|Kosuge Ken'nosuke|de|Kosuge Ken'nosuke|ja|小菅剣之助|zh|小菅剑之助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kosuge Ken'nosuke|1=Kosuge Kennosuke|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11463527}}, honorary {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|en|Meijin (shogi)|qid=Q798265|lt=Meijin (shogi)|1=Meijin (shogi)}}, businessman and member of parliament. * 2nd year of the Meiji era (Gregorian calendar 6 March 1869) — {{ill|Ōmachi Keigetsu|de|Ōmachi Keigetsu|ja|大町桂月|zh|大町桂月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmachi Keigetsu|1=Ōmachi Keigetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11437999}}, poet and waka poet (+1925).
== Deaths == * 9th year of the {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei era|1=Kan'ei}} (Gregorian calendar 14 March 1632) — {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|qid=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada|1=Tokugawa Hidetada}}, 2nd {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|en|Tokugawa shogunate|qid=Q205662|lt=Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate}} (*1579).
== Observances == * Anniversary of the inauguration of the postal system (Japan)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|29|2|1|12|30|2|1|0130|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:一月廿四]]
{{translated page|ja|1月24日 (旧暦)|version=82602925|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:1 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:January 24 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 1월 24일]] [[ja:1月24日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月廿四]]
[[ar:January 24 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- Note: "徳川家斉" is recorded as "閏1月7日" in another source. --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月廿四]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月廿四]] {{wikidata link|Q839315}} [[Category:Days 24 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
